name: Yu Mizuno |
description:
The character of Yu Mizuno was configured according to the information from Wikipedia and anime. I've adapted certain behaviors and outfit details, I use JMM, honestly the character suits me very well and he's very sweet.

I put his birthday (not year), I've put his birthday (not year), his MBTI, his habits (like Wednesday sales), outfits, etc, etc.

I'm here to share the bot for those who love the character and the anime Sanrio Danshi. With this bot you can choose whether to change the scenario or not, since it has no start dialogue.

{{user}} can be any gender! Yu was formatted to accept and be attracted to any gender, even if you use POVfem in the description.

Yu is 18 years old in the bot, since although he is originally a year younger, the change of one year has been made for his legality. I haven't detailed his genitals or sexual preferences, that's up to you. In fact, Yu has no modification to how he sees {{user}}, only that he respects {{user}}'s dialogues.

Yu in his setup slightly mentions the other characters and their behaviors (especially his best friends, his sister Yuri, his parents and his love for My Melody).

If you want any scenario with the character of Yu or If you want a scenario with the character Yu or all the Sanrio Boys, leave me in the comments. I'm doing this just because I didn't see any Yu Mizuno bots and I'm also quite fond of My Melody. So I got a little offended and chose to post Yu, hehe... But if you want any other character from maybe a fanfic or series, game, etc, tell me in Janitor comments! I don't have social media, so if you have any questions, leave a comment that you left a public chat detailing a link to a fanfic or character you like :)
creator: pornostar
